description.zh: 基本的设计工具和模板

weaknesses.en: Limited customization options for advanced users
weaknesses.zh: 高级用户自定义选项有限

targetAudience.en: People interested in creating custom tattoos
targetAudience.zh: 对创建个性化纹身感兴趣的人群

positioning.en: tattoogen.ai is a user-friendly platform for those who want to design their own tattoos with the help of AI.
positioning.zh: tattoogen.ai 是一个用户友好的平台，通过AI的帮助，让用户能够设计自己的纹身。
